(b) list of names of owners, shareholders, proprietor and authorized signatory of applicant; (c) list of key managernent personnel and technical experts engaged by the applicant and their qrulifications and experience in various fields relating to warehousing; td) staternent of frnancial credibility in the form of audited reports or budget staternent E':th supporting documents ; {ei declaration that the applicant shallnot accredit any warehouse in which it rnay have a <lirect conflict of interest; (f; declaration that the applicant slrall cornply with the terms and conditions of certificate of registration; and (g) a non-refundable registraiion fte of rupees twenty-five thousand tluough bank draft/banker's cheque of any nationalized bank in favour of Drawing and Disbursing Officer, Warehousing Developrnent and Regulatory Authorityi payable in Neu,Delhi, and (h) a securiry deposit oi'rupees one lekh through bank draftAanker's cheque of any nationalizcd bank in i"avour of Drawing and Disbursing Officer, Warehousing Development and Regulatory Aurtrority payable inNew Delhi: Provided tfuit the Governrnent contnolled institution or body may be exempted from payment of,sccurity deposit 5. Power tsrnake enquiry rnd crll for informrtion at the time of registrrtion .- (llBefore grurting registration to an accreditation agency under rule 6, the Authority rnay make such inquiry and require such further inforrnation, as it deerns necessary, other than thc infonnation fumished by the accreditation agency in the application.
